title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: redhat-rpm-config bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for redhat-rpm-config is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The redhat-rpm-config package is used during the build of RPM packages to apply various default distribution options determined by Red Hat. Also, redhat-rpm-config provides a few Red Hat RPM macro customizations, such as those used during the building of Driver Update packages.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s):  _hardening_linker_errors macro accidentally dropped in commit fda90b0a420d46b3c98463492db31dbdb886f56b [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-91949)

full_text:
An update for redhat-rpm-config is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The redhat-rpm-config package is used during the build of RPM packages to apply various default distribution options determined by Red Hat. Also, redhat-rpm-config provides a few Red Hat RPM macro customizations, such as those used during the building of Driver Update packages.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s):  _hardening_linker_errors macro accidentally dropped in commit fda90b0a420d46b3c98463492db31dbdb886f56b [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-91949)
